trades.reasoning: Full 4-signal confirmation (RSI 55.4 in bullish zone, MACD crossover, histogram rising, price above SMA-20) with the most RSI headroom among score-95 candidates; deploying cash above the $500 threshold on a risk-on day per portfolio risk rules.

decisions.briefing: Markets posted moderate risk-on gains today — NASDAQ +1.2%, S&P 500 +0.9% — enough to justify deploying the $677 in idle cash with 4 open slots available. F (Ford) earns the buy with the strongest technical setup among score-95 candidates: all four confirming signals present and RSI at 55.4, the lowest among peers, giving the most room to run before hitting overbought territory. All six existing positions are held; no stop-losses or profit targets triggered today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly with the NASDAQ gaining 1.2% and the S&P 500 rising 0.9%, extending the risk-on tone that has characterized markets in early July 2026. Investors appeared comfortable with the growth backdrop, rotating into cyclical and technology names as no major macro headwinds emerged. The broad-based advance across sectors suggests institutional participation rather than a narrow, sentiment-driven spike.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一全面上揚，納斯達克指數上漲1.2%，標普500指數升0.9%，延續2026年七月初以來的風險偏好格局。在宏觀面未見明顯利空的情況下，投資人信心持穩，資金輪動至週期性及科技板塊。漲勢涵蓋多個板塊，顯示機構投資者積極布局，而非單一情緒面驅動的窄幅反彈。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means requiring several independent technical indicators to agree before entering a trade, rather than acting on just one. Today's buy of F checked four signals simultaneously — RSI in the bullish zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price above the 20-day moving average — which together suggest institutional buying rather than a random intraday spike. The more signals that align, the higher the probability the move is real and sustainable.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重信號確認是指在進場前要求多個獨立技術指標同時發出一致信號，而非僅憑單一指標作決策。今日買入福特（F）同時滿足四項條件：RSI處於多頭區間、MACD黃金交叉、柱狀圖持續上升，以及股價站上20日均線，四項信號共振顯示背後有機構資金介入，而非短暫的盤中波動。同時發出訊號的指標越多，行情持續的可能性越高。
